projects.name: Buf CLI
projects.desc: The modern standard for Protobuf management. Includes a linter, formatter, breaking change detector, editor LSP support, and a high-performance code generator.

projects.name: protolint
projects.desc: A highly configurable linter for Protocol Buffer files to ensure style consistency and best practices.

projects.name: Google API Linter
projects.desc: Check your API design against Google's API Improvement Proposals (AIPs) to ensure industry-standard naming and patterns.

projects.name: protovalidate
projects.desc: Runtime validation for Protobuf messages using rules defined directly in your .proto files.

projects.name: Plumber
projects.desc: CLI tool for inspecting and routing messages in Kafka, RabbitMQ, and SQS with native on-the-fly Protobuf decoding.

projects.name: protoc-gen-doc
projects.desc: Generates beautiful documentation (HTML, Markdown, PDF) from your .proto files.

projects.name: protoc-gen-connect-openapi
projects.desc: Generates high-quality OpenAPI 3.x definitions from your Protobuf services, with excellent support for ConnectRPC and gRPC-Gateway.

projects.name: protoc-gen-jsonschema
projects.desc: Generates JSON Schema definitions from your Protobuf messages, so you can use them with JSON-based validation tools.

projects.name: protoc-gen-grpc-gateway
projects.desc: Automatically generates a reverse proxy server that translates RESTful JSON APIs into gRPC, allowing you to support both protocols easily.

projects.name: gRPC
projects.desc: The industry standard for high-performance RPC. Originally developed by Google, it uses HTTP/2 and supports advanced features like bidirectional streaming and server reflection.

projects.name: ConnectRPC
projects.desc: A simple, modern, multi-protocol alternative to gRPC for Go, TypeScript, Kotlin, Swift, and Python. Supports gRPC, gRPC-Web, and Connect HTTP protocols natively.

projects.name: Twirp
projects.desc: A simple and minimalist RPC framework by Twitch. It focuses on reliability and simplicity, using Protobuf over HTTP/1.1 without the complexity of gRPC.

projects.name: dRPC
projects.desc: A lightweight Go replacement for gRPC by Storj. Designed to be leaner and faster, it reduces memory overhead while remaining compatible with existing Protobuf definitions.

projects.name: Apache brpc
projects.desc: An industrial-grade C++ RPC framework by Baidu. It is heavily optimized for extreme concurrency and low latency, often used in massive service deployments.

projects.name: Apache Dubbo
projects.desc: A popular microservices framework from Alibaba. Its 'Triple' protocol natively adopts HTTP/2 and Protobuf for modern, gRPC-compatible serialization.

projects.name: protobuf-c (C)
projects.desc: C: https://github.com/protobuf-c/protobuf-c

projects.name: upb (C)
projects.desc: C: https://github.com/haberman/upb/wiki

projects.name: protobluff (C)
projects.desc: C: https://github.com/squidfunk/protobluff

projects.name: dart-protobuf (Dart)
projects.desc: Dart: https://github.com/dart-lang/dart-protobuf (runtime) https://github.com/dart-lang/dart-protoc-plugin (code generator)

projects.name: exprotoc (Elixir)
projects.desc: Elixir: https://github.com/jeremyong/exprotoc

projects.name: Wire
projects.desc: A clean, lightweight implementation built by Square, generating idiomatic JVM/Android models and service interfaces.

projects.name: ProtoBuf.js (JavaScript)
projects.desc: JavaScript: https://github.com/dcodeIO/ProtoBuf.js

projects.name: ProtoBuf.jl (Julia)
projects.desc: Julia: https://github.com/tanmaykm/ProtoBuf.jl

projects.name: php-protocolbuffers (PHP)
projects.desc: PHP: https://github.com/chobie/php-protocolbuffers

projects.name: protobuf (Ruby)
projects.desc: Ruby: https://github.com/localshred/protobuf

projects.name: rust-protobuf (Rust)
projects.desc: Rust: https://github.com/stepancheg/rust-protobuf/

projects.name: protobuf-swift (Swift)
projects.desc: Swift: https://github.com/alexeyxo/protobuf-swift

projects.name: sofa-pbrpc (https)
projects.desc: https://github.com/BaiduPS/sofa-pbrpc (C++)

projects.name: libmaid (https)
projects.desc: https://github.com/w359405949/libmaid (C++, Python)

projects.name: libpbrpc (https)
projects.desc: https://github.com/madwyn/libpbrpc (C++)

projects.name: protobuf-codec
projects.desc: Another JSON encoder/decoder for Java

projects.name: idea-plugin-protobuf
projects.desc: Intellij IDEA plugin

projects.name: protobuf-cppbuilder
projects.desc: C++ Builder compatible protobuf

projects.name: maven-protoc-plugin
projects.desc: Maven Protocol Compiler Plugin https://github.com/sergei-ivanov/maven-protoc-plugin/

projects.name: protoc-jar-maven-plugin
projects.desc: https://github.com/os72/protoc-jar-maven-plugin

projects.name: protobuf-nginx
projects.desc: Protobuf for nginx module

projects.name: sbt-cppp
projects.desc: Sbt plugin for Protocol Buffers

projects.name: gradle-plugin-protobuf
projects.desc: Gradle Protobuf Plugin

projects.name: protoc-jar
projects.desc: Multi-platform executable JAR and Java API for protoc

projects.name: py-pb-converters
projects.desc: Python scripts to convert between Protocol Buffers and JSON

projects.name: pbjson
projects.desc: C++ library for serialization/de-serialization between Protocol Buffers and JSON.

projects.name: protoc-gen-doc
projects.desc: Documentation generator plugin (Markdown/HTML/DocBook/...)

projects.name: protobuf-el
projects.desc: ProtoBuf with Java EE7 Expression Language 3.0; pure Java ProtoBuf Parser and Builder.

projects.name: protoc-gen-lint
projects.desc: Linter for .proto files

projects.name: protobuf-es
projects.desc: The official ECMAScript runtime and code generator (protoc-gen-es) for Protocol Buffers from Buf.

projects.name: protoplugin
projects.desc: A Go library designed to simplify the creation of protoc plugins by providing hardening and a cleaner interface.

projects.name: connect-query-es
projects.desc: TypeScript-first expansion pack for TanStack Query (React Query) within the ConnectRPC ecosystem.

projects.name: protobuf-ts
projects.desc: A highly popular community plugin (protoc-gen-ts) to generate TypeScript interfaces, RPC clients, and validation from .proto files.

projects.name: protoc-gen-graphql
projects.desc: A protoc plugin to automatically generate GraphQL schemas and resolver types from Protobuf definitions.

projects.name: betterproto
projects.desc: A clean, modern Python generator and library for Protobuf and gRPC, providing dataclass-based messages.

projects.name: gRPC-Web
projects.desc: A JavaScript client library and protoc plugin (protoc-gen-grpc-web) for enabling gRPC in web browsers.

projects.name: gRPC Node
projects.desc: gRPC implementation for Node.js, including native code generation plugins.

projects.name: protobuf-net
projects.desc: High-performance contract-based serialization library for .NET that implements the Protocol Buffers wire format.

projects.name: Kratos
projects.desc: A Go microservices framework for the cloud-native era, using Protobuf and gRPC as its foundation.

projects.name: grpcurl
projects.desc: Like cURL, but for gRPC: Command-line tool for interacting with gRPC servers.

projects.name: Kitex
projects.desc: High-performance Go RPC framework for building microservices, natively supporting Protobuf.

projects.name: kotlinx.serialization
projects.desc: Kotlin multiplatform / multi-format serialization library supporting JSON, CBOR, and Protocol Buffers.

projects.name: Typia
projects.desc: Super-fast runtime validators and serialization library for TypeScript using transformers, supporting Protobuf.

projects.name: TypeSpec
projects.desc: A highly extensible API design language from Microsoft that compiles to OpenAPI, JSON Schema, and Protobuf.

projects.name: Proto Actor (Go)
projects.desc: Ultra fast distributed actors for Go, C#, Java and Kotlin using Protobuf for network communication.

projects.name: Prototool
projects.desc: Your Swiss Army Knife for Protocol Buffers - compile, lint, and format protos easily.

projects.name: Prost
projects.desc: A fast, memory-efficient Protocol Buffers implementation for the Rust programming language.

projects.name: Cellnet
projects.desc: A high performance, simple, and extensible network server library for Go supporting TCP, WebSocket, and Protobuf.

projects.name: Protocol Buffers (Google)
projects.desc: Google's language-neutral, platform-neutral, extensible mechanism for serializing structured data. Contains the protoc compiler, code generator stubs, and official runtimes.

projects.name: grpcreflect-go
projects.desc: Adds support for the gRPC Server Reflection API to any Go net/http server, including those built with Connect.

projects.name: grpchealth-go
projects.desc: Provides gRPC-style health checks for any Go net/http server, including those built with Connect.

projects.name: otelconnect-go
projects.desc: Provides OpenTelemetry metrics and tracing instrumentation for Connect Go clients and servers.

projects.name: examples-es
projects.desc: TypeScript and JavaScript examples demonstrating ConnectRPC integrations with web frameworks and tools.

projects.name: connect-conformance
projects.desc: Official test suite validating interoperability, compatibility, and protocol conformance across Connect, gRPC, and gRPC-Web.

projects.name: vanguard-go
projects.desc: A library for net/http Go servers enabling transcoding between gRPC, gRPC-Web, Connect, and REST.

projects.name: Insomnia
projects.desc: A collaborative API client that supports debugging, testing, and mocking gRPC and Protobuf APIs.

projects.name: Postman
projects.desc: A popular API platform that includes support for creating, testing, and debugging gRPC requests and mocking Protobuf endpoints.

projects.name: k6
projects.desc: An open-source, developer-centric performance testing tool by Grafana that supports load testing gRPC services using custom JavaScript scenarios.

projects.name: protokt
projects.desc: A popular Kotlin-specific compiler plugin and runtime generator for Protocol Buffers, producing idiomatic Kotlin code.

projects.name: Wireshark
projects.desc: A network packet sniffer with built-in Protocol Buffers and gRPC dissectors, enabling you to decode and inspect raw binary protobuf messages over the wire.

projects.name: Protolock
projects.desc: A track-and-lock utility designed to prevent backward-incompatible changes to Protobuf schema files, saving downstream clients from breakage.

projects.name: FauxRPC
projects.desc: A tool to generate fake service implementations directly from Protobuf schemas, supporting gRPC, ConnectRPC, gRPC-Web, and REST on-the-fly.

projects.name: google.golang.org/protobuf
projects.desc: The official and current standard Go implementation for Protocol Buffers.

projects.name: molecule
projects.desc: A specialized Go library for parsing protobufs with zero memory allocation, useful for high-throughput edge systems.

projects.name: Envoy
projects.desc: A high-performance edge and service proxy with native, deep support for routing, translating, and observing gRPC/Protobuf traffic.

projects.name: gRPCui
projects.desc: An interactive web UI for gRPC, allowing you to explore and test gRPC services directly from your browser.

projects.name: Kreya
projects.desc: A popular graphical desktop client for gRPC and REST APIs, with support for server reflection and environments.

projects.name: Evans
projects.desc: A highly interactive, REPL-style command-line client for gRPC that makes exploring services via terminal intuitive.

projects.name: Tonic
projects.desc: A native gRPC client and server implementation for Rust, built on top of Hyper, Tokio, and Prost.

projects.name: ts-proto
projects.desc: A popular Protobuf compiler plugin for TypeScript that generates plain-object interfaces and simple helper classes.

projects.name: SwiftProtobuf
projects.desc: Apple's official plugin and runtime library for using Protocol Buffers within Swift projects.

projects.name: gRPC Swift
projects.desc: The official Swift gRPC library, providing client and server capabilities built on SwiftNIO.

projects.name: ScalaPB
projects.desc: The definitive Protocol Buffer compiler plugin for Scala, generating idiomatic case classes and native gRPC bindings.

projects.name: Armeria
projects.desc: An asynchronous HTTP/2 microservices framework for the JVM supporting gRPC, REST, and GraphQL simultaneously.

projects.name: Confluent Schema Registry
projects.desc: A shared registry for schema management that provides serialization/deserialization helpers and compatibility verification for Kafka.

projects.name: pbtk
projects.desc: A reverse-engineering toolkit for Protocol Buffers, helping you extract schemas from binaries and analyze payloads.

projects.name: blackboxprotobuf
projects.desc: A security and analysis utility that allows decoding and editing of Protobuf messages without having the original schemas.

projects.name: buffrs
projects.desc: A modern package manager for Protocol Buffers, providing dependency management and registry publication capabilities.

projects.name: EmbeddedProto
projects.desc: A lightweight C++ Protobuf generator optimized for microcontrollers and embedded systems, featuring zero dynamic allocations.

projects.name: grpcbin
projects.desc: A mock gRPC service (similar to httpbin) that is extremely useful for testing and debugging gRPC clients.

projects.name: elixir-protobuf
projects.desc: A pure Elixir compiler and runtime library implementation for Protocol Buffers.

projects.name: protox
projects.desc: A reasonably fast, easy to use and 100% conformant Elixir library for Google Protocol Buffers (aka protobuf).

projects.name: grpclib
projects.desc: A pure-Python asyncio-based implementation of a gRPC client and server, with zero external C dependencies.

projects.name: protobuf-decoder
projects.desc: A lightweight, browser-based tool to decode and inspect raw binary Protocol Buffers logs and payloads on-the-fly.

projects.name: protocurl
projects.desc: A command-line tool (similar to cURL) to make requests to HTTP endpoints that accept or return Protocol Buffers.

projects.name: protobuf-javascript
projects.desc: The official JavaScript Protocol Buffers code generator plugin (protoc-gen-js).

projects.name: protobuf-dart
projects.desc: The official Dart code generator plugin (protoc-gen-dart) and runtime library for Protocol Buffers.

projects.name: grpc-go
projects.desc: The official Go implementation of gRPC, including the protoc-gen-go-grpc code generator plugin.

projects.name: grpc-java
projects.desc: The official Java implementation of gRPC, including the protoc-gen-grpc-java code generator plugin.

projects.name: protoc-gen-validate
projects.desc: A protoc compiler plugin to generate polymorphic validation rules for Go, Java, C++, and Python schemas.

projects.name: hyperpb
projects.desc: 10x faster dynamic Protobuf parsing in Go, acting as a high-performance VM-based replacement for dynamicpb.
